# Whereby Embedded Documentation

Whereby Embedded is the easiest way to add video calls to your web page or mobile app. Get up and running in minutes, not months, so you're free to focus on what you do best — your business.

👉 [View the full documentation](https://docs.whereby.com)

## Getting Started

- [Overview of Whereby Embedded](https://docs.whereby.com/getting-started/overview-of-whereby-embedded/)
- [Set up your Embedded account](https://docs.whereby.com/getting-started/overview-of-whereby-embedded/initial-setup)

- [Web component & Pre-built UI](https://docs.whereby.com/whereby-for-web-browser/web-component-and-pre-built-ui/)
- [Web app quickstart](https://docs.whereby.com/whereby-for-web-browser/web-component-and-pre-built-ui/web-app-quickstart)

## Further Resources

- Join our [Discord developer community](https://discord.com/invite/uWRcPWbGJB) to collaborate and find answers.
- Design a better, faster video call experience with our [Figma Video Call UI Kit](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1411023646481069706/video-call-ui-kit-by-whereby).
- Consult our [End User Support Center](https://docs.whereby.com/end-user/end-user-support-guides/) for product help.
